name: Romesco Mayo
recipeIngredient: 1 red bell pepper, cored, seeded, and chopped
1 cup seeded and diced ripe plum tomatoes
salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a saucepan over low heat. Add the garlic and cook until pale golden; remove the garlic and set aside.
2. Place the almonds in the pan and raise the heat slightly. Cook, stirring, for 3 minutes or until golden. Add the almonds to the garlic.
3. Add the onion and bell pepper; stir over low heat for 15 minutes.
4. Add the tomatoes, orange zest, juice, salt, and black pepper; cook for 5 minutes.
5. Add the reserved garlic and almonds. Cook for 2 more minutes. Remove from heat and let cool.
6. Puree and stir into the mayonnaise. Refrigerate, covered, until ready to use. Makes 2 cups.
Per tablespoon: 73 calories, 1g carbohydrates, no protein, 8g fat, 3mg cholesterol.
